leadText: The Rose Incense (Japanese: おはなのおこう Flower Incense) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It is an incense that allows Roselia and Roserade to produce Budew Eggs. In battle, its effect is identical to the Miracle Seed.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Grass-type moves by 20%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by either parent of a pairing in Pokémon Day Care or the Pokémon Nursery that would produce a Roselia Egg , a Budew Egg is produced instead.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Grass-type moves by 20%.

This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of the holder's Grass-type moves.
